chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.1413 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For order on MA. 8562/2024. 2. For order on MA. 8563/2024. 3. For hearing of bail application. 27.06.2024 Ms. Seema A. Satti, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant. == 1. Granted. 2. Granted. 3. Applicant Muhammad Hussain seeks protective bail in Crime No.133/2024 u/s 506/B, 34 PPC registered at P.S. City Courts, Karachi Learned counsel submits that the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in the present case lodged with delay of two days; that the applicant has nothing to do with the alleged offence but he has been implicated with malafide intention and ulterior motives; that the applicant intends to approach the concerned court for relief in accordance with law but apprehends his arrest as the police is behind him to arrest, disgrace and humiliate him, hence he needs protection. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days from today or surrender of the applicant before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE AK
